notes: pbr/personal.narc selected because game-data-targets marks it as the high-confidence pokemon-personal NARC target.
Records are decoded with the conservative Gen IV 44-byte personal/base-stat layout.
Only bytes 0-25 are assigned field names; bytes 26-43 are preserved in unknown_hex.
national_dex_candidate mirrors the archive child index only for indexes 1 through 493; other slots are left null.
No Pokemon display names are fabricated from the ROM data.
parsed as NARC with 501 child files
most common NARC child size is 44 bytes across 501 children
child count covers the 493 Gen IV Pokemon range; extra children may be forms or sentinels
